title.vi: Toi nen mang gi den tiec tan gia?
title.en: What should I bring to the housewarming?

subtitle.vi: Mo bai bang tu vung tan gia, di sau vao -아/어야 되다 va -고요, roi khoa lai bang email va hoi thoai co khung.
subtitle.en: Open with housewarming vocabulary, push through -아/어야 되다 and -고요, then close with scaffolded email and dialogue work.

summary.vi: Lam quen voi tu vung cot loi, loi nho giup do, va cau hoi mo bai cua bai 17.
summary.en: Start Unit 17 with the core housewarming words, help expressions, and the title question.

prompt.vi: Noi tu tieng Han voi dung y nghia.
prompt.en: Match the Korean word with the correct meaning.

explanation.vi: Day la danh tu trung tam cua ca bai 17.
explanation.en: This is the central noun of Unit 17.

prompt.vi: Noi tu tieng Han voi dung y nghia.
prompt.en: Match the Korean word with the correct meaning.

explanation.vi: Vat dung nay xuat hien ngay tu phan mo bai workbook.
explanation.en: This item appears immediately in the workbook warm-up.

prompt.vi: Noi tu tieng Han voi dung y nghia.
prompt.en: Match the Korean word with the correct meaning.

explanation.vi: Dong tu nay noi voi viec chuan bi do an va tiec.
explanation.en: This verb connects directly to preparing food and the party.

prompt.vi: Dich cau tieng Han sang y nghia.
prompt.en: Translate the Korean into its meaning.

explanation.vi: Hieu dung cau nho giup do truoc khi tu noi lai.
explanation.en: Understand the help-request expression before producing it yourself.

meaning.vi: Ban co the giup toi mot chut duoc khong?
meaning.en: Could you help me a bit?

prompt.vi: Dich y nghia sang tieng Han.

explanation.vi: Doi tu y nghia sang cau de nghi giup do lich su.
explanation.en: Convert the meaning into the polite offer-to-help sentence.

explanation.vi: Dien dung vat dung duoc dung de moi ban be.
explanation.en: Fill in the item used to invite friends.

prompt.vi: Sap xep lai cau hoan chinh.
prompt.en: Arrange the words into a complete sentence.

explanation.vi: Sap xep lai cau nho giup do de quen trat tu.
explanation.en: Rebuild the help-request sentence to lock in its word order.

meaning.vi: Ban co the giup toi mot chut duoc khong?
meaning.en: Could you help me a bit?

explanation.vi: Ket lesson bang cau hoi cot loi cua bai 17.
explanation.en: Close the lesson with Unit 17's core title question.

summary.vi: Khoa mau nghia vu bang dang bien doi dong tu va cac cau can phai lam.
summary.en: Lock in the obligation pattern through verb-form changes and must-do sentences.

explanation.vi: Bat dau bang dang bien doi cot loi cua mau nghia vu.
explanation.en: Start with the core conjugation pattern for obligation.

explanation.vi: Dien cach noi nghia vu voi dong tu `하다`.
explanation.en: Fill the obligation form for the verb `하다`.

explanation.vi: Doi tinh huong sang dong tu `만나다` nhung giu nguyen mau nghia vu.
explanation.en: Switch to the verb `만나다` while keeping the same obligation pattern.

explanation.vi: Noi viec bat buoc phai di den mot noi nao do.
explanation.en: State that you must go somewhere.

clue.en: have to go to the hospital

prompt.vi: Dich y nghia sang tieng Han.

explanation.vi: Dich cau nghia vu goc cua bai 17 sang tieng Han.
explanation.en: Translate Unit 17's central obligation sentence into Korean.

prompt.vi: Sap xep lai cau hoan chinh.
prompt.en: Arrange the words into a complete sentence.

explanation.vi: Sap xep lai cau can phai mang theo do dung.
explanation.en: Rebuild the sentence about something you have to bring.

meaning.vi: Va cung phai mang theo mu boi nua.
meaning.en: And I also have to bring a swim cap.

explanation.vi: Lap lai cau hoi phai lam gi de tao phan xa.
explanation.en: Say the core must-do question aloud to build reflex.

explanation.vi: Ket lesson bang mot cau nghia vu dai hon.
explanation.en: Finish the lesson with a slightly longer obligation sentence.

summary.vi: Nghe y nghia, ghep lai luot thoai, va mo rong thong tin bang -고요.
summary.en: Work through dialogue turns and extend information with -고요.

prompt.vi: Dich cau tieng Han sang y nghia.
prompt.en: Translate the Korean into its meaning.

explanation.vi: Hieu cau hoi ve tiec tan gia truoc khi ghep lai phan tra loi.
explanation.en: Understand the housewarming question before rebuilding the answer.

meaning.vi: Jihun, o tiec tan gia thuong lam gi?
meaning.en: Jihun, what do people usually do at a housewarming?

tasks.koreanText: 지훈 씨, 집들이에서 보통 뭘 해요?

explanation.vi: Ghep lai luot thoai ve cac hoat dong trong tiec tan gia.
explanation.en: Rebuild the line about what people do at the housewarming.

translation.vi: Moi nguoi xem nha, va cung an cung nhau nua.
translation.en: People look around the house, and they eat together too.

explanation.vi: Ghep lai cau moi den tiec tan gia vao cuoi tuan.
explanation.en: Rebuild the invitation to the weekend housewarming.

translation.vi: Lisa, cuoi tuan nay toi dinh to chuc tiec tan gia. Ban co the den duoc khong?
translation.en: Lisa, I am planning a housewarming this weekend. Can you come?

explanation.vi: Ghep lai cau de nghi giup do de noi liền mach hoi thoai.
explanation.en: Rebuild the offer-to-help line so the dialogue flows naturally.

translation.vi: Tat nhien roi. Toi co the giup mot chut khong?
translation.en: Of course. Should I help a little?

explanation.vi: Dien them mot y bo sung bang -고요.
explanation.en: Add one more supporting point with -고요.

explanation.vi: Dung -고요 de bo sung them mot loi ich nua.
explanation.en: Use -고요 to add one more benefit.

prompt.vi: Sap xep lai cau hoan chinh.
prompt.en: Arrange the words into a complete sentence.

explanation.vi: Sap xep lai cau noi hai hoat dong lien tiep.
explanation.en: Arrange the line that links two activities together.

meaning.vi: Moi nguoi xem nha, va cung an cung nhau nua.
meaning.en: People look around the house, and they eat together too.

explanation.vi: Ket lesson bang mot cum hoi thoai ngan co -고요 va loi de nghi giup do.
explanation.en: Close the lesson with a short dialogue chunk using -고요 and a help offer.

tasks.koreanText: 집을 구경해요. 같이 식사도 하고요. 그럼요. 제가 좀 도와줄까요?

tasks.audioText: 지훈: 내일 샤오위 씨, 집들이가 몇 시예요? 리사: 저녁 여섯 시예요. 그런데 집들이에 뭘 사 가야 돼요? 지훈: 보통 세제를 사 가고, 휴지도 사 가요. 리사: 그럼 휴지하고 세제를 제가 사 갈까요? 지훈: 좋아요. 그럼 샤오위 씨 집에서 만나요.
